metadata.method: Attribution patching estimate from arXiv:2310.10348: for each selected module output, score = sum((clean_activation - corrupted_activation) * d margin(corrupted) / d corrupted_activation). Positive scores estimate nodes whose clean activations would restore DA-2K depth-order margin.
metadata.objective: mean over selected DA-2K pairs of depth(point1) - depth(point2); point1 is labeled closer.
